creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #18)

The BIOS version calls itself F11e , not just F11 .
Where GIGABYTE lists just F11 is incomplete/wrong. So
I'm putting the e' back in various places to avoid
ambiguity.

I have reverted to F11e from F12e because FreeBSD fails
to native-boot with F12e . (There is another bugzilla
submittal for F12e .)
